topic: The Ulti-Meta Manifesto — A Declaration for Reciprocal Performance (Omni-Dromenon-Engine)
content_preview: Founding manifesto of the Omni-Dromenon-Engine project (ORGAN-II). Unpacks the compressed formula ulti-meta--multiversal--poly-algorithm-rhythmic--constant-morph-meme into eight sections: diagnosis of fossilized performance, metaphysical foundation, reciprocal systems vision, six non-negotiable principles (mutable state, computational audiences, non-repetition, genre as parameter skin, transparent hierarchy, technology serves reciprocity), constrained variation principle, implications, memetic strategy, and call to action.
